case_title: GLORIA T. BURRESS VS. ADAN MORAN

docket_entries.description: MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2011 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON SEP-06-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 218, MICHAEL BEGERT. TIME ESTIMATE: 4 HOURS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
COURT TRIAL ON SEP-06-2011 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF ADAN MORAN IN THE AMOUNT OF $480. JUDGE MICHAEL I. BEGERT, CLERK DANIAL LEMIRE.
DEPOSIT OF UNDERTAKING, TRAN # W3211616D017, TAG # 028690 DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF BURRESS, GLORIA T. ,AN INDIVIDUAL
MINUTES FOR SEP-06-2011 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 218

NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY APPELLANT BURRESS, GLORIA T. ,AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO RESPONDENT MORAN, ADAN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-06-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

COURT TRIAL ON SEP-06-2011, COURT HEARS EVIDENCE FROM BOTH SIDES AND ADMITS EXHIBITS INTO EVIDENCE, MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON SEP-06-2011 BY MICHAEL BEGERT. JUDGE MICHAEL BEGERT, CLERK DANIAL LEMIRE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MORAN, ADAN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT BURRESS, GLORIA T. ,AN INDIVIDUAL $480.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $480.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
